meta.title: Pesti Est — Budapest events, culture & going out
meta.description: Free Budapest program guide: cinema, theatre, exhibitions, concerts, restaurants and nightlife by district.

sidebar.listVenueBody: Reach night owls and culture seekers across Budapest.

footer.tagline: Neon-lit local guide · Prices for planning only

split.title: Crew split
split.subtitle: Divide the tab before someone mysteriously forgets their card. Pulls from your night budget or a custom total.
split.fromBudget: {count, plural, one {# venue} other {# venues}} in your budget · {total} subtotal
split.manualHint: No venues in the budget yet — enter a total or add spots first.
split.emptyMessage: Add venues to your budget or enter a manual total above.
split.crewHint: Drag the slider — includes the friend who said they would pay you back.
split.roundUpHint: Avoid awkward €23.47 moments at the ATM.
split.funLine: The one who ordered pálinka for the table still owes double. House rules.
split.shareLine: Pesti Est crew split: {perPerson} each ({people} people, {total} total incl. tip)

home.heroSubtitle: Events, parties, restaurants, cafés, and culture — curated by district and neighborhood.
home.heroTagline: Neon-lit. Local. Built for nights out in Budapest.
home.heroImageAlt: Budapest city lights at night along the Danube

events.description: Dated concerts, festivals & ticketed shows with start and end times

venues.description: Concert halls, clubs, galleries & spaces that host the night

parties.description: Clubs, ruin bars, DJ sets, themed nights & weekend blowouts

restaurants.description: Fine dining, bistro gems, street food courts & Danube-side tables

cafes.description: Specialty coffee, brunch spots, dessert bars & all-day hangouts

culture.description: Gallery walks, culture circles, food clubs & local creator meetups

home.neighborhoodSectionTitle: Find the night in your neighborhood

home.popularPicksSectionTitle: Neon picks to get you started

guides.title: Belváros nightlife & dining
guides.desc: Riverside bars, classic bistros, and late kitchens in the inner city.

guides.title: Jewish Quarter ruin bars
guides.desc: Ruin pubs, street food, and party energy in Erzsébetváros.

guides.title: Andrássy culture strip
guides.desc: Galleries, cafés, and elegant nights along Terézváros.

guides.title: Buda castle & hill views
guides.desc: Castle district wine bars, thermal vibes, and sunset terraces.

sharePage.notFoundBody: This listing may have moved or the link is outdated.

notFound.subtitle: Signal lost somewhere in District VII
notFound.headline: This page went home before last call
notFound.line1: You took a wrong turn between the Danube, a ruin bar, and a thermal bath that definitely was not on the map.
notFound.line2: Even the map gave up and ordered another pálinka.
excuses: Szimpla Kert absorbed it during a jazz set
It only exists after 3 AM and you are early
The pálinka deleted it for sport
GPS gave up and moved to Buda
A party boat has it now. No refunds.

eatDrink.subtitle: Browse dishes and drinks with published prices across Budapest venues — then try a themed three-stop tour.

palinka.title: Pálinka trail
palinka.description: Three spots known for Hungarian fruit brandy — bars, cellars, and ruin pubs.

foodie.title: Budapest foodie loop
foodie.description: Classic Hungarian plates and street bites across three neighborhoods.

coffee.description: Third-wave cafés and espresso bars for a slow afternoon.

palinka.title: Pálinka trail
palinka.description: Three venues with pálinka on the menu, spread across districts when possible.

foodie.title: Budapest foodie loop

coffee.title: Specialty coffee crawl

program.weekSubtitle: Highlights from Pesti Est — refreshed every Thursday.

program.spotlightEventsHint: Headline shows after this week — tickets and details on Pesti Est.
program.emptyWeekTitle: No events in this week yet
program.emptyWeekMessage: The program refreshes every Thursday. Browse the full calendar for what's already on sale.
program.emptyVertical: No listings yet for this vertical.
program.editorialBody: Pesti Est is the digital successor to Budapest's free weekly program magazine—cinema, theatre, exhibitions, concerts, and family events, refreshed every Thursday.
